text:
## Update 2026-06-28
**Error:** Fragile block editor clicks and Rank Math inputs failing to save values.
**Fix:** Used direct Gutenberg and Rank Math JavaScript Redux APIs via `wp.data` and `wp.apiFetch` in the page console: `wp.data.dispatch('core/editor')` and `wp.data.dispatch('rank-math')` to programmatically and cleanly set blocks, SEO title, keywords, meta description, categories, tags, and upload featured media.
**Prevention:** For WordPress Gutenberg and Rank Math automation, always use direct Redux state dispatches via wp.data and wp.apiFetch in the browser context rather than simulating raw mouse clicks and input entries.
